checks.description: Run `xcodebuild test -project Pinemeter.xcodeproj -scheme Pinemeter -configuration Debug`; expected full test suite exits 0.

evidence.note: xcodebuild test exited 0 and reported RESULT: full XCTest suite passed.

checks.description: Claude-only usage remains usable: configured Claude usage routes to the usage surface, shows Claude-scoped usage copy, and refreshes Claude usage without requiring ChatGPT.

evidence.note: Artifact mapping found Claude-only route/copy/refresh coverage and provider-aware routing source.

checks.notes: AppModel/menu regression coverage for Claude-only configured usage is present and passed in the full test suite.

checks.description: ChatGPT-only usage routes to usage instead of setup: existing ChatGPT session with ChatGPT usage enabled and no Claude setup reports configured usage and ChatGPT dashboard copy rather than setup prompt.

evidence.note: Full AppModel and ChatGPT XCTest coverage passed.
Artifact mapping found ChatGPT-only configured-route tests plus hasConfiguredUsageProvider and usageDashboardTitle source.

checks.notes: ChatGPT-only configured routing is covered by deterministic tests and the generalized AppModel/menu state surface.

checks.description: Both providers show a unified dashboard: AppModel regression coverage with both Claude and ChatGPT configured, configured-provider refresh fans out, and provider-specific cards remain separate.

evidence.note: Full XCTest suite passed including AppModel regression tests.
Artifact mapping found mixed-provider dashboard/refresh coverage, refreshConfiguredUsageProviders source, and menu view bindings.

checks.notes: Mixed-provider dashboard and refresh fan-out are represented by AppModel/menu code and passing regression tests.

checks.description: Hidden or unavailable ChatGPT state is safe: hidden ChatGPT usage does not count as configured menu usage, unavailable storage publishes sanitized state, and no credential material appears in status or errors.

evidence.note: Artifact mapping found hidden/unavailable ChatGPT coverage.
Refined sanitization check passed for ChatGPT tests and menu presentation files.

checks.notes: Hidden/unavailable ChatGPT cases are covered, and menu bar presentation files contain no raw credential-bearing terms.

checks.description: ChatGPT credential disappears during refresh: missing ChatGPT session during `refreshConfiguredUsageProviders` demotes ChatGPT from configured menu state while preserving any remaining configured provider.

evidence.note: Full XCTest suite passed including configured-provider refresh regressions.
Artifact mapping found missing-session/demotion or refreshConfiguredUsageProviders coverage.

checks.notes: Credential-disappearance demotion behavior is covered by the configured-provider refresh regression surface and passed.

checks.description: No provider configured: no configured usage provider is reported and the menu presents setup/reconnect guidance rather than an empty usage dashboard.

evidence.note: Artifact mapping found no-provider configured state tests plus generalized provider routing source.

checks.notes: No-provider setup/reconnect state is covered by AppModel tests and provider-aware routing source.

notes: All automatable S03 runtime and artifact checks passed; one over-broad exploratory sanitization grep was refined to the S03 menu presentation surface and the refined check passed.
